S&P 500 at 7,513 is pushing above its recent range — a move that only matters if it holds. 10Y yield at 4.48% is elevated relative to its rolling mean — starting to lean but not decisive. Oil at $90 is sitting near its 63-session mean — no signal from oil.

• 10Y moves beyond 4.68% or below 4.28%
